title: The Unsolved Murder of John Lennon

segments.text: In December 1980, music legend John Lennon was shot outside his home.
His tragic death shocked fans worldwide and forever changed music history.
Mark David Chapman was convicted, but many theories surround the crime.
Some believe it was a conspiracy, while others focus on Chapman alone.
The motives behind the murder are still heavily debated.
A tragic loss that still resonates in popular culture today.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: John Lennon’s murder remains a troubled and debated topic in music history. Follow for daily cold cases!
